descriptionHtml:
Hanse 385 for sale 2014 | 3 Cabins Version | Tax Not Paid

This Hanse 385 for sale 2014 presents an excellent opportunity to acquire a modern, well-maintained sailing yacht, ideal for both private cruising and professional charter operations. Launched in 2014, she has had careful ownership throughout her life and is being offered in good condition with a comprehensive equipment list. Having worked just one season in 2024, she is equipped and prepared for immediate use with a thoughtful range of upgrades and extras.

Specifications – Hanse 385 for sale 2014

General

  • Model: Hanse 385
  • Year Built: 2014
  • Location: Greece
  • Condition: Good, maintained professionally – one recent season of use
  • LOA: 11.40 m
  • Beam: 3.88 m
  • Draft: 1.99 m
  • Hull Colour: White
  • Construction: Polyester
  • Cabins: 3
  • Heads: 1
  • Berths: Up to 7

Tank Capacities & Speed

  • Fuel Tank: Approx. 160 L
  • Fresh Water: Approx. 320 L
  • Holding/Waste Tank: ~60 L (with biological treatment system – upgraded)
  • Cruising Speed: Approx. 6 knots
  • Maximum Speed: Approx. 8 knots

Propulsion & Mechanical

  • Engine: Volvo Penta D2‑40F diesel, 40 hp (approx. 800 hours)
  • Primary Propeller: GORI folding propeller 16.5×13×3 LH9 (with overdrive, upgrade worth €3,500)
  • Spare Propellers: 3‑blade 17×13 and 2‑blade 17×14
  • Bow Thruster: Quick BTR 185‑85 retractable (12 V)
  • Tenders: 2.5m tender with Honda 2.3HP outboard

Electrical & Energy

  • Solar: 555W solar array (3 panels, 30A controller)
  • Batteries: 2 x AGM Carbon North (195Ah each) for service, 100Ah (engine), 100Ah (bow thruster)
  • Chargers: Victron Smart 100/50, Mastervolt 220v/12v/50A
  • Inverter: Victron 150W
  • Electronics Control: Victron battery monitor and control panel; shorepower inlet

Rigging & Sails

  • Fractional sloop rig, aluminium mast/boom, 9/10-rig, 2 spreaders
  • Furling, fully-battened mainsail (~44m²), furling self-tacking genoa (~30m²)
  • Additional sails: Spinnaker, gennaker, gear & pole
  • Electric winches (sheet, running, cockpit)

Deck & Safety Equipment

  • Teak in cockpit & bathing platform
  • Electric anchor windlass (Quick)
  • Sprayhood, bimini, dual steering
  • Gangway, inox protection (bow & stern), stern protection belt
  • Cockpit cushions, swim ladder
  • Safety: EPIRB, life raft, automatic life jackets, lifebuoy, fire extinguishers
  • Full set of professional safety equipment

Interior & Comfort

  • Layout: 3 cabins (2 aft doubles, 1 forward V-berth), large saloon seats 8, chart table
  • Galley: 2-burner gas stove & oven, 130L refrigerator, stainless steel sink, melamine kitchenware set
  • Hot water boiler, 4 Caframo Bora fans
  • TV, VHF/AIS, Fusion sound system with interior/cockpit speakers
  • LED programmable lighting (interior & deck)

Other Notable Upgrades and Extras

  • Complete biological cleaning and hull polishing
  • Extra fenders
  • Automatic life bag system
  • Ready for professional charter with all statutory safety and life-saving gear on board

For buyers seeking a Hanse 385 for sale 2014, this yacht offers a realistic combination of good condition, complete equipment, and professional charter readiness—right on the water in Greece. For more information or to arrange inspection, please get in touch.
